meta.source_title: Survey on AI Memory: Theories, Taxonomies, Evaluations, and Emerging Trends
meta.authors: Bai et al. (Baijia AI, BUPT, Huawei)

extracted_concepts.name: 4W Memory Taxonomy
extracted_concepts.description: Classify memory on 4 orthogonal axes: When (lifecycle: transient/session/persistent), What (type: procedural/declarative/metacognitive/personalized), How (storage: implicit/explicit), Which (modality: single/multimodal)

extracted_concepts.name: CLS Dual-Structure Consolidation
extracted_concepts.description: Complementary Learning Systems: hippocampus (fast episodic capture) + neocortex (slow semantic consolidation) with sleep-phase replay bridging them. Key insight: separate rapid acquisition from gradual integration.

extracted_concepts.name: Metacognitive Memory Type
extracted_concepts.description: Distinct memory category for self-reflection, capability assessment, strategy feedback. Systems: Reflexion (task feedback summaries), Memento (auto-analyze behaviors, extract improvement suggestions), LightSearcher (self-cognitive experience module).

extracted_concepts.name: Heat-Score Consolidation Trigger
extracted_concepts.description: MemoryOS Heat Score: composite of access_frequency × interaction_depth × time_decay. When score exceeds threshold, system invokes LLM to extract user traits and factual knowledge, promoting to Long-Term Personal Memory.

extracted_concepts.name: Hierarchical Abstract-to-Detail Routing
extracted_concepts.description: H-MEM: 4-level semantic abstraction with index-based routing. Locate macro intent at abstract level first, then drill down to detailed memories. Avoids exhaustive similarity computation across entire store.

extracted_concepts.name: Goal-Aware Retrieval
extracted_concepts.description: Transform retrieval from fixed similarity lookups to dynamic evaluation that prioritizes memories which best reduce task uncertainty. Frame memory maintenance as a sequential decision problem, not pattern matching.

extracted_concepts.name: Corrective Memory Updates / Conflict Detection
extracted_concepts.description: H-MEM: dynamic weight regulation combining forgetting curves with user feedback. WISE: dual-parametric side-memory scheme isolating corrections from pre-trained knowledge. Detect contradictions, update rather than accumulate.

extracted_concepts.name: Predict-Calibrate Cycle
extracted_concepts.description: Nemori: proactively evolve knowledge base by predicting outcomes from internal forecasts, comparing with actual interactions, and distilling insights from discrepancies. Converts passive storage into active hypothesis testing.

extracted_concepts.name: MemoryField Gravitational Fusion
extracted_concepts.description: Treat memories as dynamic nodes in a gravitational field. Semantically similar and spatially close nodes merge via fusion mechanism, reducing redundancy. Higher-density representations replace clusters of overlapping memories.

extracted_concepts.name: Sleep-Time Offline Consolidation
extracted_concepts.description: LightMem: cognition-inspired sleep-time consolidation. Scheduled offline phase: reorganize, deduplicate, and abstract long-term memory entries without impacting online query performance.

extracted_concepts.name: Dynamic Evaluation Metrics
extracted_concepts.description: Current benchmarks evaluate at discrete time points. Need metrics tracking evolutionary trajectory of memory states — how retrieval quality, consolidation effectiveness, and knowledge coverage change over time. Analogous to clinical vital-sign tracking.

extracted_concepts.name: Personalized Memory as Distinct Type
extracted_concepts.description: User models, preference drift, relationship tracking as a first-class memory category. Mem0 maintains preferences; MemoryBank adapts to evolving user profiles. Requires balancing personalization with privacy.

extracted_concepts.name: PBFT-Backed Semantic Voting
extracted_concepts.description: Multi-agent consensus protocol for collaborative forgetting. Agents vote (adapted PBFT) to prune low-utility data from collective store. Ensures shared memory remains accurate and compact through autonomous optimization layer.

extracted_concepts.name: Experience Distillation to Executable Templates
extracted_concepts.description: Voyager: builds expanding executable skill library from episodic traces. LightSearcher: distills successful reasoning trajectories into reusable patterns. Transform raw episodes into structured, replayable action sequences.

extracted_concepts.name: Kendall's τ for Temporal Perception
extracted_concepts.description: Rank correlation metric between predicted and ground-truth event timelines. Used to evaluate temporal reasoning quality — can the system reconstruct event sequences and track state changes from unstructured text?

edge_walk.current_boundary: query_parser.rs::analyze_query() → QueryAnalysis with IC weights + OntologicalIntent → graph_retrieval.rs scoring
edge_walk.gap: No task-goal signal. System treats information-seeking and decision-support queries identically.
edge_walk.data_crossing: Session context (task type, tool invocations) → goal classification → retrieval weight modulation
edge_walk.failure_mode: Mis-inferred goals suppress correct results; needs confidence threshold + fallback

edge_walk.gap: No contradiction check between new and existing entity-scoped memories
edge_walk.data_crossing: New memory embedding + entities → entity-scoped search → contradiction classifier → supersession link
edge_walk.failure_mode: False-positive contradiction on compatible but nuanced statements

edge_walk.gap: No continuous heat scoring. Frequently-accessed young memories cannot be fast-tracked.
edge_walk.data_crossing: access_count + context richness + recency → heat_score → auto-trigger threshold
edge_walk.failure_mode: Aggressive heat-triggered consolidation over-abstracts useful episodic details

edge_walk.gap: No system-level capability assessment. No tracking of what query types struggle.
edge_walk.data_crossing: Per-query quality signals → aggregated quality-by-domain → gap detection → consolidation priorities
edge_walk.failure_mode: Noisy quality signals waste consolidation cycles on already-good areas

fractal_breaks.name: ExperienceType is flat, survey demands hierarchy
fractal_breaks.description: 14 ExperienceType variants treated as flat set. Survey's 4W 'What' dimension groups into Procedural/Declarative/Metacognitive/Personalized. Compression.rs applies same pipeline to CodeEdit (procedural) and Conversation (declarative). Consolidation strategy should bifurcate by content category.

fractal_breaks.name: No self-monitoring at any granularity
fractal_breaks.description: Coordinated fractal absence: no tracking of memory usefulness (memory level), no retrieval failure patterns (graph level), no quality evolution metrics (system level). System cannot observe its own performance at any scale.

spike_triggers.description: Metacognitive memory as a distinct architectural layer — a feedback channel from retrieval outcomes back into memory governance
Goal-aware retrieval connects query_parser.rs → sessions.rs → graph_retrieval.rs in a way not currently wired

application_map.name: Metacognitive Memory — Retrieval Quality Tracker
application_map.change: Extend to aggregate quality signals into RetrievalQualityTracker tracking success/failure rates by entity cluster, query type, and time window

application_map.name: Heat-Score Consolidation Trigger
application_map.change: Replace CONSOLIDATION_MIN_AGE_DAYS gate with heat_score = access_count × log(1 + context_richness) × recency_factor. Fire when heat exceeds threshold AND age > 3 days.

application_map.name: Conflict Detection on Remember
application_map.change: After entity extraction, query existing memories sharing ≥1 focal entity with cosine > 0.7. If temporal contradiction detected, create supersedes relation and decay old memory importance by 50%.

application_map.name: Goal-Aware Retrieval Weighting
application_map.change: Extend QueryType with DecisionSupport/InformationSeeking/TemporalOrdering/PatternRecognition. Modulate w_sem/w_graph/w_ling by goal type.

application_map.name: Type-Specific Consolidation Paths
application_map.change: Add consolidation_strategy() on ExperienceType returning ExtractFacts/ExtractPatterns/ExtractReflections/ExtractPreferences. Route through type-appropriate extractor pipelines.

application_map.name: Gravitational Deduplication in Consolidation
application_map.change: For pairs with cosine > 0.85: merge entity sets, take higher importance, concatenate content with dedup, tombstone lower-importance original.

application_map.name: Scheduled Sleep-Phase Consolidation
application_map.change: New handler composing: large-sample replay cycle, gravitational dedup, tier promotion sweep, decay application. Decouples heavy work from online path.

application_map.name: Predict-Calibrate Loop for Proactive Context
application_map.change: Record prediction of relevant memories before query, compare with actual retrieval, score accuracy, feed low-accuracy patterns into consolidation priority queue.

application_map.name: Kendall's τ Temporal Benchmark
application_map.change: Store N events with known temporal ordering, query with temporal questions, measure Kendall's τ rank correlation. Validates temporal_facts.rs + temporal_fact_boost pathway.

application_map.name: Dynamic Retrieval Quality Metrics
application_map.change: Record per-query retrieval quality scores (top-1 relevance, NDCG@5) over time. Add get_quality_trajectory(time_window) returning quality trend + worst-performing entity clusters. Surface in consolidation_report.
